_comment: Curated third-party inventory (verified against installed metadata 2026-07-21, legal-readiness review). Source of truth for THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES.md — edit THIS file, then run scripts/build-third-party-notices.py. The --check mode enforces byte-parity of the generated file AND coverage of every direct dependency declared in pyproject.toml, web/package.json, and site/package.json.

python_runtime.name: rfc8785
python_runtime.note: RFC 8785 (JCS) encoder — Trail of Bits; version-pinned per ADR-0013

python_runtime.name: jsonschema
python_runtime.note: JSON Schema 2020-12 validation of the trust-boundary contracts

python_runtime.name: psycopg
python_runtime.note: Postgres driver; the ONE non-permissive runtime dep — separately installed, never vendored; exception analysis in docs/review-queue.md section 2 (rides ADR-0014 items 7/18)

python_runtime.name: psycopg-binary
python_runtime.note: bundles libpq, which is PostgreSQL License (permissive)

python_dev.name: hypothesis
python_dev.note: weak file-level copyleft; used unmodified as a test dep, never redistributed — no obligations attach (MPL-2.0 §3 triggers on distribution of MPL-covered files)

python_dev.name: pip-audit
python_dev.note: PyPA dependency-vulnerability auditor; exact-pinned and lock-resolved; audits a hash-bearing frozen production export without dependency resolution

python_dev.name: spdx-tools
python_dev.note: official SPDX 2.3 parser/validator used only by the release dry run; exact-pinned

python_dev.name: (other dev transitives)
python_dev.note: execnet, pluggy, iniconfig, rich, mypy-extensions, markdown-it-py, mdurl (MIT); Pygments (BSD-2); sortedcontainers (Apache-2.0); pathspec (MPL-2.0, unmodified dev-only)

web_shipped.name: react / react-dom
web_shipped.note: ships in web/dist, therefore inside the PyPI wheel (ADR-0018)

web_shipped.name: lucide-react
web_shipped.note: attribution-preserving ISC terms; consumed as code via the internal icon registry — no committed icon files

web_shipped.name: tailwindcss (generated CSS)
web_shipped.note: the generated stylesheet ships; the tool itself is dev-only

web_dev.name: (all other web devDependencies)
web_dev.note: vite, vitest, storybook, @storybook/react-vite, @storybook/addon-a11y, @storybook/addon-vitest, eslint, eslint-plugin-boundaries, eslint-plugin-jsx-a11y, eslint-import-resolver-typescript, typescript-eslint, @tanstack/eslint-plugin-query, @tanstack/eslint-plugin-router, @tanstack/router-plugin, stylelint, stylelint-declaration-strict-value, prettier, msw, size-limit, @size-limit/preset-app, json-schema-to-typescript, @vitejs/plugin-react, @vitest/browser-playwright, @tailwindcss/vite, @types/node, @types/react, @types/react-dom

site.name: astro
site.note: static output; runtime helpers in built HTML are MIT

site.name: @astrojs/markdown-satteri
site.note: explicit pin of Astro 7's markdown processor (local plugins import a declared dependency)

site.name: pagefind
site.note: dev-time indexer; the self-hosted search bundle it emits ships in site/dist (loads only on user gesture)

fonts.name: @ibm/plex-sans
fonts.note: upstream-built Latin1 woff2 subsets copied byte-identically by fonts:sync (drift-checked); NOT locally modified or re-subsetted, so the 'Plex' Reserved Font Name clause for Modified Versions is not triggered; OFL.txt travels adjacent to the font files in every distribution
